class.name: ResonanceServer
class.brief_description: Singleton managing Steam Audio context, scene, and simulation. Driven by ResonanceRuntime.
class.description: ResonanceServer is the low-level Steam Audio engine. Typically accessed via [ResonanceRuntime] and [ResonancePlayer]. Use get_singleton() for advanced scripting. Controls listener position, geometry, probe batches, and simulation tick. Debug flags (debug_occlusion, debug_reflections, debug_pathing) enable ray visualization; output_direct and output_reverb gate direct/reverb output for debugging.

method.name: get_sample_rate
method.description: Returns the current sample rate from AudioServer.

method.name: is_initialized
method.description: Returns true if the Steam Audio engine is initialized.

method.name: is_simulating
method.description: Returns true if simulation (pathing/reflections) is running.

method.name: notify_geometry_changed
method.description: Notifies the server of geometry change (triangle count delta). Called when dynamic geometry is added/removed.

method.name: tick
method.description: Advances simulation (pathing, reflections). Called each frame by ResonanceRuntime.

method.name: set_listener_valid
method.description: Set whether the listener is valid for pathing. When false, RunPathing is skipped (saves CPU). On Windows, iplSimulatorRunPathing is wrapped in SEH—crashes from unreachable listener (ghost through walls, noclip) are caught; pathing skips that frame and continues.

method.name: update_listener
method.description: Updates listener position and orientation. Called by ResonanceListener or ResonanceRuntime fallback.

members.member: Enable reflection ray visualization. Requires Realtime Rays > 0 in ResonanceRuntimeConfig.
Enable pathing segment visualization (green = unoccluded, red = occluded).
Enable direct sound output. For debugging; normally true via config.
Enable reverb output. For debugging; normally true via config.
